title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Vibhuti urges Anu and David to be smart about their investments, leading to heated accusations. Later, Angoori, Tiwari and Ammaji reveal their financial downfall.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Angoori sends some roti with Vibhuti for Ammaji but Urmila, the new homeowner, falsely accuses Vibhuti of theft. Meanwhile, Vibhuti's family unexpectedly receives food.

title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
desc: Tasked by Angoori, Vibhuti delivers provisions to Ammaji. However, Urmila, the property's new owner, levels accusations of stealing against Vibhuti.
